description: The Clan Magliulo was a Camorra syndicate based in Afragola, Italy, operating also in lower Lazio and Caserta. It was considered one of the most powerful Camorra families. Founded by Mario Magliulo, brother-in-law of Casalesi boss Antonio Bardellino, the clan was involved in construction contracts, control of shopping centers, drug trafficking, and a bloody feud with the Moccia clan. It suffered major asset seizures in 1990.
